features.name: Agile
features.description: The rat doesn't provoke an Opportunity Attack when it moves out of an enemy's reach.

actions.name: Bite
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +2, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1 Piercing damage.

tactical_info.combat_role: Pest - Tiny agile creature with escape ability
tactical_info.positioning: Uses Agile trait to move without provoking attacks
tactical_info.damage_output: 1 piercing per hit, minimal threat individually
tactical_info.key_abilities: Agile movement, climbing ability, small size
tactical_info.weaknesses: Extremely low HP and damage output
tactical_info.synergies: Effective in swarms or as environmental nuisances
